---
title: "ChatGPT — Data Profile"
subtitle: "Catalogo descritivo dos parquets do parser canonico"
jupyter: python3
---

```{python}
#| label: setup
#| code-summary: "Setup — paths, conexao DuckDB, helpers"

import sys
from pathlib import Path

# Resolve project root dinamicamente (parent do notebooks/)
_this = Path.cwd()
_project_root = _this if (_this / "src").exists() else _this.parent
sys.path.insert(0, str(_project_root))

import pandas as pd
import duckdb
import plotly.graph_objects as go
import plotly.express as px
from itables import init_notebook_mode, show

init_notebook_mode(all_interactive=False)

# --- DuckDB sobre os parquets — perf melhor que pandas ---
PROCESSED = _project_root / "data" / "processed" / "ChatGPT"
con = duckdb.connect()
for table in ("conversations", "messages", "tool_events", "branches"):
    con.execute(
        f"CREATE VIEW {table} AS SELECT * FROM read_parquet('{PROCESSED}/{table}.parquet')"
    )

# --- Constantes visuais ---
SOURCE_COLOR = "#74AA9C"  # ChatGPT green
MUTED = "#D1D5DB"


def fmt_pct(n, total):
    """Formata 'n/total (XX%)' pra colunas de cobertura."""
    pct = n / total * 100 if total else 0
    return f"{n:,}/{total:,} ({pct:.0f}%)"


def show_df(df, **kwargs):
    """Mostra DataFrame com estilo padrao (sem index)."""
    from IPython.display import display
    display(df.style.hide(axis="index"))


def plotly_bar(x, y, title, color=SOURCE_COLOR, height=350, orientation="v"):
    """Helper pra Plotly bar consistente."""
    if orientation == "h":
        fig = go.Figure(go.Bar(y=x, x=y, marker_color=color, orientation="h"))
    else:
        fig = go.Figure(go.Bar(x=x, y=y, marker_color=color))
    fig.update_layout(
        title=title, height=height, template="plotly_white",
        margin=dict(t=50, b=40, l=40, r=20),
    )
    return fig
```

# Visao geral

```{python}
#| label: overview
#| code-summary: "Totais por tabela"

totals = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM conversations) AS conversations,
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM messages) AS messages,
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tool_events) AS tool_events,
        (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM branches) AS branches
""").df()

range_dt = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        MIN(created_at) AS oldest,
        MAX(created_at) AS newest_created,
        MAX(updated_at) AS newest_updated
    FROM conversations
""").df()

show_df(pd.DataFrame([
    {"Tabela": "conversations.parquet", "Rows": f"{totals['conversations'].iloc[0]:,}", "Periodo": f"{range_dt['oldest'].iloc[0]:%Y-%m-%d} → {range_dt['newest_created'].iloc[0]:%Y-%m-%d}"},
    {"Tabela": "messages.parquet", "Rows": f"{totals['messages'].iloc[0]:,}", "Periodo": "—"},
    {"Tabela": "tool_events.parquet", "Rows": f"{totals['tool_events'].iloc[0]:,}", "Periodo": "—"},
    {"Tabela": "branches.parquet", "Rows": f"{totals['branches'].iloc[0]:,}", "Periodo": "—"},
]))
```

> **Sobre este documento.** Catalogo descritivo dos parquets gerados pelo
> parser canonico do ChatGPT (`src/parsers/chatgpt.py`). Apresenta o que esta
> nos dados — schema, cobertura, distribuicoes, preservation. **Nao interpreta**
> conteudo (sem sentiment, clustering, topic detection). Pra analise
> qualitativa, ver projeto `~/Desktop/AI Interaction Analysis/`.

# 1. Dados disponiveis

Cada uma das 4 tabelas tem schema proprio. Aqui mostramos os campos, sua
cobertura nesta base (quantas linhas tem o campo preenchido) e amostras
diversificadas — registros que ilustram a variedade de cada tabela.

## 1.1 Conversations

A tabela de conversas é a unidade central. Cada linha representa um chat
do ChatGPT.com — com seus metadados (titulo, modelo, projeto, datas) e
campos de preservation criados pelo parser (`is_preserved_missing`,
`last_seen_in_server`).

```{python}
#| label: conv-schema
#| code-summary: "Cobertura por campo — conversations"

cov = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        COUNT(*) AS total,
        COUNT(title) AS title,
        COUNT(model) AS model,
        COUNT("mode") AS "mode",
        COUNT(project) AS project,
        COUNT(project_id) AS project_id,
        COUNT(gizmo_id) AS gizmo_id,
        COUNT(last_seen_in_server) AS last_seen_in_server,
        SUM(is_preserved_missing::INT) AS preserved_count
    FROM conversations
""").df()
total = cov["total"].iloc[0]

def conv_cov(field):
    return fmt_pct(int(cov[field].iloc[0]), int(total))

schema_conv = pd.DataFrame([
    {"Campo": "conversation_id", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "ID unico da conv (UUID do ChatGPT)", "Cobertura": f"{total:,}/{total:,} (100%)"},
    {"Campo": "source", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "Sempre 'chatgpt' nesta tabela", "Cobertura": f"{total:,}/{total:,} (100%)"},
    {"Campo": "title", "Tipo": "str?", "Descricao": "Titulo gerado pelo servidor", "Cobertura": conv_cov("title")},
    {"Campo": "created_at", "Tipo": "timestamp", "Descricao": "Quando a conv foi criada", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "updated_at", "Tipo": "timestamp", "Descricao": "Ultima msg na conv (servidor bumpa em rename)", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "message_count", "Tipo": "int", "Descricao": "Msgs visiveis na branch ativa (user+assistant nao hidden)", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "model", "Tipo": "str?", "Descricao": "Ultimo model_slug do assistant na conv", "Cobertura": conv_cov("model")},
    {"Campo": "mode", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "Sempre 'chat' (parser nao infere modes especificos)", "Cobertura": conv_cov("mode")},
    {"Campo": "project", "Tipo": "str?", "Descricao": "Nome do project (`g-p-*`) na sidebar", "Cobertura": conv_cov("project")},
    {"Campo": "project_id", "Tipo": "str?", "Descricao": "ID do project (`g-p-...`) — separado de gizmo_id", "Cobertura": conv_cov("project_id")},
    {"Campo": "gizmo_id", "Tipo": "str?", "Descricao": "Custom GPT real (prefixo `g-` mas NAO `g-p-`)", "Cobertura": conv_cov("gizmo_id")},
    {"Campo": "is_preserved_missing", "Tipo": "bool", "Descricao": "True se conv sumiu do servidor (preservada local)", "Cobertura": f"{int(cov['preserved_count'].iloc[0])} flagged"},
    {"Campo": "last_seen_in_server", "Tipo": "timestamp", "Descricao": "Data da ultima run em que servidor retornou a conv", "Cobertura": conv_cov("last_seen_in_server")},
    {"Campo": "url", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "Link `https://chatgpt.com/c/<id>`", "Cobertura": "100%"},
])
show_df(schema_conv)
```

```{python}
#| label: conv-sample
#| code-summary: "Amostra diversificada — conversations"
#| column: page

sample_conv = con.execute("""
    WITH
    with_project AS (
        SELECT * FROM conversations WHERE project IS NOT NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
    ),
    standalone AS (
        SELECT * FROM conversations WHERE project_id IS NULL AND gizmo_id IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
    ),
    custom_gpt AS (
        SELECT * FROM conversations WHERE gizmo_id IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1
    ),
    preserved AS (
        SELECT * FROM conversations WHERE is_preserved_missing=TRUE ORDER BY last_seen_in_server LIMIT 1
    ),
    longest AS (
        SELECT * FROM conversations ORDER BY message_count DESC LIMIT 1
    ),
    shortest AS (
        SELECT * FROM conversations WHERE message_count > 0 ORDER BY message_count ASC LIMIT 1
    ),
    no_model AS (
        SELECT * FROM conversations WHERE model IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
    )
    SELECT DISTINCT ON (conversation_id)
        substr(conversation_id, 1, 8) AS conv_id,
        title, message_count AS msgs, model,
        project, gizmo_id IS NOT NULL AS is_custom_gpt,
        is_preserved_missing AS preserved,
        strftime(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS created
    FROM (
        SELECT * FROM with_project
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM standalone
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM custom_gpt
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM preserved
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM longest
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM shortest
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM no_model
    )
    ORDER BY conversation_id
""").df()
show_df(sample_conv)
```

## 1.2 Messages

Mensagens user/assistant. Mensagens com `role=tool` viram `tool_events`
(nao aparecem aqui). Mensagens internas (assistant chamando tool) ficam
preservadas com `is_hidden=True` e `hidden_reason='internal_recipient'`.

```{python}
#| label: msg-schema
#| code-summary: "Cobertura por campo — messages"

mcov = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        COUNT(*) AS total,
        COUNT(model) AS model,
        SUM(is_voice::INT) AS voice,
        SUM(is_hidden::INT) AS hidden,
        COUNT(asset_paths) AS asset_paths,
        COUNT(finish_reason) AS finish_reason,
        COUNT(content_types) AS content_types
    FROM messages
""").df()
mtotal = mcov["total"].iloc[0]

def msg_cov(field):
    return fmt_pct(int(mcov[field].iloc[0]), int(mtotal))

schema_msg = pd.DataFrame([
    {"Campo": "message_id", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "ID unico (UUID do servidor)", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "conversation_id", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "FK pra conversations", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "branch_id", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "FK pra branches (default `<conv>_main`)", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "sequence", "Tipo": "int", "Descricao": "Ordem cronologica dentro da conv (1,2,3...)", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "role", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "'user' ou 'assistant' (tool vai pra tool_events)", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "content", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "Texto da msg (extract_text consolidado)", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "model", "Tipo": "str?", "Descricao": "model_slug do assistant (NULL se role=user)", "Cobertura": msg_cov("model")},
    {"Campo": "created_at", "Tipo": "timestamp", "Descricao": "Hora da msg no servidor", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "word_count", "Tipo": "int", "Descricao": "Calculado pelo parser na escrita", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "content_types", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "CSV de markers (text, code, dalle, image_upload, audio_transcription, etc)", "Cobertura": msg_cov("content_types")},
    {"Campo": "is_voice", "Tipo": "bool", "Descricao": "True se tem `audio_transcription` em parts", "Cobertura": f"{int(mcov['voice'].iloc[0])} flagged"},
    {"Campo": "voice_direction", "Tipo": "str?", "Descricao": "'in' (user) ou 'out' (assistant)", "Cobertura": f"{int(mcov['voice'].iloc[0])} (so quando is_voice)"},
    {"Campo": "asset_paths", "Tipo": "list[str]?", "Descricao": "Paths resolvidos de uploads do user (image_asset_pointer SEM dalle)", "Cobertura": msg_cov("asset_paths")},
    {"Campo": "finish_reason", "Tipo": "str?", "Descricao": "stop / max_tokens / unknown / interrupted", "Cobertura": msg_cov("finish_reason")},
    {"Campo": "is_hidden", "Tipo": "bool", "Descricao": "True se msg eh interna (preservada mas nao user-facing)", "Cobertura": f"{int(mcov['hidden'].iloc[0])} flagged"},
    {"Campo": "hidden_reason", "Tipo": "str?", "Descricao": "internal_recipient / visually_hidden / weight_zero", "Cobertura": f"{int(mcov['hidden'].iloc[0])} (so quando is_hidden)"},
])
show_df(schema_msg)
```

```{python}
#| label: msg-sample
#| code-summary: "Amostra diversificada — messages"
#| column: page

sample_msg = con.execute("""
    WITH
    user_msg AS (
        SELECT * FROM messages WHERE role='user' AND NOT is_hidden
        ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
    ),
    assistant_msg AS (
        SELECT * FROM messages WHERE role='assistant' AND NOT is_hidden
        ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
    ),
    voice_in AS (
        SELECT * FROM messages WHERE is_voice AND voice_direction='in' LIMIT 1
    ),
    voice_out AS (
        SELECT * FROM messages WHERE is_voice AND voice_direction='out' LIMIT 1
    ),
    with_asset AS (
        SELECT * FROM messages WHERE asset_paths IS NOT NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
    ),
    hidden AS (
        SELECT * FROM messages WHERE is_hidden ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
    ),
    truncated AS (
        SELECT * FROM messages WHERE finish_reason='max_tokens' LIMIT 1
    )
    SELECT
        substr(message_id, 1, 8) AS msg_id, role,
        substr(content, 1, 60) AS content_preview,
        word_count AS wc, model, content_types,
        is_voice, voice_direction, is_hidden, hidden_reason, finish_reason,
        asset_paths IS NOT NULL AS has_asset
    FROM (
        SELECT * FROM user_msg
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM assistant_msg
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM voice_in
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM voice_out
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM with_asset
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM hidden
        UNION ALL SELECT * FROM truncated
    )
""").df()
show_df(sample_msg)
```

## 1.3 Tool Events

Operacoes nao-conversacionais: search (browser, web), code (python),
canvas (canmore.*), deep_research, image_generation (DALL-E), quote
(tether_quote), memory (bio), file_search, computer_use, other (JIT plugins).

```{python}
#| label: evt-schema
#| code-summary: "Cobertura por campo — tool_events"

ecov = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        COUNT(*) AS total,
        COUNT(tool_name) AS tool_name,
        COUNT(file_path) AS file_path,
        COUNT(result) AS result,
        COUNT(metadata_json) AS metadata_json
    FROM tool_events
""").df()
etotal = ecov["total"].iloc[0]

def evt_cov(field):
    return fmt_pct(int(ecov[field].iloc[0]), int(etotal))

schema_evt = pd.DataFrame([
    {"Campo": "event_id", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "`<conv>_evt_<seq>`", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "conversation_id", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "FK pra conversations", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "message_id", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "ID da msg parent que invocou (do mapping)", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "event_type", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "Categoria: search/code/canvas/deep_research/image_generation/quote/memory/file_search/computer_use/other", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "tool_name", "Tipo": "str?", "Descricao": "Nome exato (preservado): browser.search, python, canmore.create_textdoc, etc", "Cobertura": evt_cov("tool_name")},
    {"Campo": "file_path", "Tipo": "str?", "Descricao": "Path resolvido em disco (so DALL-E/computer_use geram)", "Cobertura": evt_cov("file_path")},
    {"Campo": "result", "Tipo": "str?", "Descricao": "Texto puro do output (snippets, stdout, brief)", "Cobertura": evt_cov("result")},
    {"Campo": "metadata_json", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "JSON da metadata completa da msg-tool", "Cobertura": evt_cov("metadata_json")},
])
show_df(schema_evt)
```

```{python}
#| label: evt-sample
#| code-summary: "Amostra — 1 tool_event de cada event_type"
#| column: page

sample_evt = con.execute("""
    SELECT DISTINCT ON (event_type)
        event_type,
        tool_name,
        substr(result, 1, 60) AS result_preview,
        file_path IS NOT NULL AS has_file_path
    FROM tool_events
    ORDER BY event_type
""").df()
show_df(sample_evt)
```

## 1.4 Branches

Caminho linear no `mapping` da conv. Conv sem fork tem 1 branch
(`<conv>_main`). Conv com fork tem N branches: a `_main` vai do root
ate o fork, cada child do fork comeca uma sub-branch (com
`parent_branch_id`).

```{python}
#| label: br-schema
#| code-summary: "Cobertura por campo — branches"

bcov = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        COUNT(*) AS total,
        SUM(is_active::INT) AS active,
        SUM((parent_branch_id IS NULL)::INT) AS main,
        SUM((parent_branch_id IS NOT NULL)::INT) AS forks
    FROM branches
""").df()
btotal = bcov["total"].iloc[0]

schema_br = pd.DataFrame([
    {"Campo": "branch_id", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "`<conv>_main` ou `<conv>_<root_node_id>`", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "conversation_id", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "FK pra conversations", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "root_message_id", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "Primeira msg da branch", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "leaf_message_id", "Tipo": "str", "Descricao": "Ultima msg seguindo children", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "is_active", "Tipo": "bool", "Descricao": "Branch contem `current_node` (a que o usuario ve no UI)", "Cobertura": f"{int(bcov['active'].iloc[0]):,} (1 por conv)"},
    {"Campo": "created_at", "Tipo": "timestamp", "Descricao": "create_time da root (no nanoseconds)", "Cobertura": "100%"},
    {"Campo": "parent_branch_id", "Tipo": "str?", "Descricao": "NULL pra main; aponta pra branch que originou pra forks", "Cobertura": f"{int(bcov['forks'].iloc[0])} forks / {int(bcov['main'].iloc[0])} main"},
])
show_df(schema_br)
```

```{python}
#| label: br-sample
#| code-summary: "Amostra — main vs fork"

sample_br = con.execute("""
    WITH
    main_solo AS (
        SELECT b.*, c.title FROM branches b
        JOIN conversations c USING (conversation_id)
        WHERE b.parent_branch_id IS NULL
        AND b.conversation_id IN (
            SELECT conversation_id FROM branches GROUP BY conversation_id HAVING COUNT(*)=1
        ) ORDER BY b.created_at DESC LIMIT 1
    ),
    main_with_forks AS (
        SELECT b.*, c.title FROM branches b
        JOIN conversations c USING (conversation_id)
        WHERE b.parent_branch_id IS NULL
        AND b.conversation_id IN (
            SELECT conversation_id FROM branches GROUP BY conversation_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1
        ) ORDER BY b.created_at DESC LIMIT 1
    ),
    fork AS (
        SELECT b.*, c.title FROM branches b
        JOIN conversations c USING (conversation_id)
        WHERE b.parent_branch_id IS NOT NULL ORDER BY b.created_at DESC LIMIT 1
    )
    SELECT title,
        substr(branch_id, 1, 30) AS branch_id_preview,
        substr(parent_branch_id, 1, 30) AS parent,
        is_active
    FROM (SELECT * FROM main_solo UNION ALL SELECT * FROM main_with_forks UNION ALL SELECT * FROM fork)
""").df()
show_df(sample_br)
```

# 2. Cobertura e gaps

Onde estao as lacunas — campos que nem sempre o servidor preenche, ou
artefatos que o parser nao consegue resolver completamente.

## 2.1 Convs sem `model` (78 convs)

`Conversation.model` sai do **ultimo `model_slug` do assistant** na branch
ativa. Quando a conv eh somente user msg (ou o servidor nao retornou
model_slug), o campo fica NULL.

```{python}
#| label: model-gap-temporal
#| code-summary: "Distribuicao temporal das convs sem model"

no_model = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        strftime(created_at, '%Y-%m') AS mes,
        COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE model IS NULL) AS sem_model,
        COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE model IS NOT NULL) AS com_model
    FROM conversations
    GROUP BY mes ORDER BY mes
""").df()

fig = go.Figure()
fig.add_trace(go.Bar(x=no_model["mes"], y=no_model["com_model"],
                     name="Com model", marker_color=SOURCE_COLOR))
fig.add_trace(go.Bar(x=no_model["mes"], y=no_model["sem_model"],
                     name="Sem model", marker_color=MUTED))
fig.update_layout(
    barmode="stack", title="Convs por mes — com e sem model",
    height=350, template="plotly_white",
    xaxis=dict(type="category"),
    margin=dict(t=50, b=80, l=40, r=20),
    legend=dict(orientation="h", y=-0.2),
)
fig.show()

# Perfil das convs sem model
perfil = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        CASE WHEN model IS NULL THEN 'Sem model' ELSE 'Com model' END AS grupo,
        COUNT(*) AS n,
        ROUND(AVG(message_count), 1) AS avg_msgs,
        MEDIAN(message_count)::INT AS median_msgs,
        MAX(message_count) AS max_msgs
    FROM conversations GROUP BY grupo
""").df()
show_df(perfil)
```

## 2.2 Cobertura de `model` em messages

`Message.model` so eh preenchido em msgs `role=assistant` (user msgs sao
sempre NULL por design — user nao escolhe model). Em assistant msgs, a
cobertura depende de o servidor incluir `metadata.model_slug` na resposta.

```{python}
#| label: model-msg-coverage
#| code-summary: "Cobertura de model em messages por role"

mcov_role = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        role,
        COUNT(*) AS total,
        COUNT(model) AS com_model,
        COUNT(*) - COUNT(model) AS sem_model,
        ROUND(COUNT(model) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct_cobertura
    FROM messages GROUP BY role ORDER BY role
""").df()
show_df(mcov_role)
```

## 2.3 Asset paths nao-resolvidos

ToolEvents `image_generation` (DALL-E) e `computer_use` geram arquivos.
O parser tenta resolver o `asset_pointer` pra path em disco
(`data/raw/ChatGPT/assets/<tipo>/<conv>/<file_id>__*`). Quando o
arquivo nao esta presente (sumiu antes do download), `file_path` fica NULL.

```{python}
#| label: asset-resolved
#| code-summary: "Cobertura de file_path em ToolEvents"

asset_cov = con.execute("""
    SELECT event_type,
        COUNT(*) AS total,
        COUNT(file_path) AS resolved,
        COUNT(*) - COUNT(file_path) AS missing,
        ROUND(COUNT(file_path) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 1) AS pct
    FROM tool_events
    WHERE event_type IN ('image_generation', 'computer_use')
    GROUP BY event_type ORDER BY pct DESC
""").df()
show_df(asset_cov)
```

```{python}
#| label: msg-asset-distrib
#| code-summary: "Quantos asset_paths por msg (uploads do user)"

asset_count = con.execute("""
    SELECT len(asset_paths) AS n_assets, COUNT(*) AS n_msgs
    FROM messages WHERE asset_paths IS NOT NULL
    GROUP BY n_assets ORDER BY n_assets
""").df()

fig = plotly_bar(
    x=asset_count["n_assets"].astype(str), y=asset_count["n_msgs"],
    title=f"Distribuicao de uploads por msg ({int(asset_count['n_msgs'].sum()):,} msgs com pelo menos 1 asset)",
    height=300,
)
fig.update_xaxes(title="Assets na msg")
fig.update_yaxes(title="N msgs")
fig.show()
```

## 2.4 Hidden messages (preservadas mas nao user-facing)

Mensagens internas do assistant (chamadas pra tools com `recipient !=
"all"`) sao preservadas com `is_hidden=True`. Sao reais — o assistant
realmente as enviou — mas nao aparecem no UI do ChatGPT.

```{python}
#| label: hidden-breakdown
#| code-summary: "hidden_reason distribution"

hidden = con.execute("""
    SELECT hidden_reason, COUNT(*) AS n FROM messages
    WHERE is_hidden=TRUE GROUP BY hidden_reason ORDER BY n DESC
""").df()
show_df(hidden)
```

# 3. Volumes e distribuicoes

Counts e timelines do que esta nos dados. **Sem interpretacao** — so o
"o que tem".

## 3.1 Conversas criadas por mes

```{python}
#| label: conv-timeline
#| code-summary: "Convs por mes (timeline)"

timeline = con.execute("""
    SELECT strftime(created_at, '%Y-%m') AS mes, COUNT(*) AS n
    FROM conversations GROUP BY mes ORDER BY mes
""").df()

fig = plotly_bar(
    x=timeline["mes"], y=timeline["n"],
    title=f"Conversas criadas por mes ({len(timeline)} meses cobertos)",
    height=350,
)
fig.update_xaxes(title="Mes", type="category")
fig.update_yaxes(title="N convs")
fig.show()
```

## 3.2 Mensagens por role

```{python}
#| label: msgs-by-role
#| code-summary: "Mensagens por role (user vs assistant)"

by_role = con.execute("""
    SELECT role,
        COUNT(*) AS total,
        COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE NOT is_hidden) AS visible,
        SUM(is_hidden::INT) AS hidden,
        ROUND(AVG(word_count), 1) AS avg_words
    FROM messages GROUP BY role
""").df()
show_df(by_role)

fig = go.Figure()
fig.add_trace(go.Bar(name="Visiveis", x=by_role["role"], y=by_role["visible"], marker_color=SOURCE_COLOR))
fig.add_trace(go.Bar(name="Hidden", x=by_role["role"], y=by_role["hidden"], marker_color=MUTED))
fig.update_layout(
    barmode="stack", title="Mensagens por role — visiveis vs hidden",
    height=300, template="plotly_white",
    margin=dict(t=50, b=40), legend=dict(orientation="h", y=-0.15),
)
fig.show()
```

## 3.3 ToolEvents por event_type

```{python}
#| label: events-by-type
#| code-summary: "ToolEvents por event_type"

evt_types = con.execute("""
    SELECT event_type, COUNT(*) AS n,
           COUNT(DISTINCT conversation_id) AS n_convs
    FROM tool_events GROUP BY event_type ORDER BY n DESC
""").df()
show_df(evt_types)

fig = plotly_bar(
    x=evt_types["event_type"], y=evt_types["n"],
    title="ToolEvents por categoria",
    height=350,
)
fig.update_xaxes(title="event_type")
fig.update_yaxes(title="N events")
fig.show()
```

## 3.4 Modelos top 10 (por count em conversations)

```{python}
#| label: top-models
#| code-summary: "Top 10 model_slugs"

top_models = con.execute("""
    SELECT model, COUNT(*) AS n FROM conversations
    WHERE model IS NOT NULL GROUP BY model ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 10
""").df()

fig = plotly_bar(
    x=top_models["model"], y=top_models["n"],
    title="Top 10 modelos (Conversation.model = ultimo model_slug do assistant na conv)",
    height=350,
)
fig.update_xaxes(title="model_slug")
fig.update_yaxes(title="N convs")
fig.show()
```

## 3.5 Convs em projects vs standalone

```{python}
#| label: project-distrib
#| code-summary: "Distribuicao project / Custom GPT / standalone"

distrib = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        CASE
            WHEN gizmo_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'Custom GPT'
            WHEN project_id IS NOT NULL THEN 'Em project'
            ELSE 'Standalone'
        END AS categoria,
        COUNT(*) AS n
    FROM conversations
    GROUP BY categoria ORDER BY n DESC
""").df()

fig = go.Figure(go.Pie(
    labels=distrib["categoria"], values=distrib["n"],
    marker=dict(colors=[SOURCE_COLOR, "#9CC1B5", MUTED]),
    textinfo="label+percent+value",
))
fig.update_layout(
    title="Convs por categoria",
    height=350, template="plotly_white",
    margin=dict(t=50, b=40),
)
fig.show()
```

## 3.6 Top 10 projects

```{python}
#| label: top-projects
#| code-summary: "Top 10 projects por count de convs"

top_projects = con.execute("""
    SELECT project, COUNT(*) AS n FROM conversations
    WHERE project IS NOT NULL GROUP BY project ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 10
""").df()

n_total_projects = con.execute(
    "SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT project) AS n FROM conversations WHERE project IS NOT NULL"
).df()["n"].iloc[0]

fig = plotly_bar(
    x=top_projects["n"], y=top_projects["project"],
    title=f"Top 10 projects (de {n_total_projects} totais)",
    height=400, orientation="h",
)
fig.update_layout(yaxis=dict(autorange="reversed"))
fig.update_xaxes(title="N convs")
fig.update_yaxes(title="")
fig.show()
```

## 3.7 Distribuicao de tamanho (msgs por conv)

```{python}
#| label: size-histogram
#| code-summary: "Histograma de message_count"

# Bin manual pra histograma legivel (com cauda longa, max=712)
sizes = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        CASE
            WHEN message_count <= 5 THEN '1-5'
            WHEN message_count <= 10 THEN '6-10'
            WHEN message_count <= 20 THEN '11-20'
            WHEN message_count <= 50 THEN '21-50'
            WHEN message_count <= 100 THEN '51-100'
            WHEN message_count <= 200 THEN '101-200'
            ELSE '200+'
        END AS bin,
        COUNT(*) AS n
    FROM conversations GROUP BY bin
""").df()
# Reordenar bins
order = ['1-5', '6-10', '11-20', '21-50', '51-100', '101-200', '200+']
sizes['bin'] = pd.Categorical(sizes['bin'], categories=order, ordered=True)
sizes = sizes.sort_values('bin')

fig = plotly_bar(
    x=sizes["bin"].astype(str), y=sizes["n"],
    title=f"Distribuicao de tamanho de conv (msgs visiveis na branch ativa)",
    height=300,
)
fig.update_xaxes(title="N msgs por conv")
fig.update_yaxes(title="N convs")
fig.show()

stats = con.execute("""
    SELECT MIN(message_count) AS min, MAX(message_count) AS max,
           ROUND(AVG(message_count), 1) AS avg, MEDIAN(message_count)::INT AS median
    FROM conversations
""").df()
show_df(stats)
```

## 3.8 Branches: forks por conv

```{python}
#| label: branches-fork-distrib
#| code-summary: "Distribuicao de branches por conv"

br_distrib = con.execute("""
    WITH counts AS (
        SELECT conversation_id, COUNT(*) AS n_branches
        FROM branches GROUP BY conversation_id
    )
    SELECT n_branches, COUNT(*) AS n_convs FROM counts
    GROUP BY n_branches ORDER BY n_branches
""").df()
show_df(br_distrib)

fig = plotly_bar(
    x=br_distrib["n_branches"].astype(str), y=br_distrib["n_convs"],
    title="Convs por numero de branches (1 = sem fork)",
    height=300,
)
fig.update_xaxes(title="N branches na conv")
fig.update_yaxes(title="N convs")
fig.show()
```

# 4. Preservation

Campos canonicos do parser pra distinguir convs **ativas no servidor** das
**preservadas localmente** (que sumiram do servidor mas continuam no
nosso merged). Tambem cobre a distincao Custom GPT vs Project — que o
servidor mistura no mesmo campo `gizmo_id`.

## 4.1 Active vs preserved_missing

```{python}
#| label: preservation-counts
#| code-summary: "Active vs preserved_missing — counts"

preservation = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        CASE WHEN is_preserved_missing THEN 'Preserved missing' ELSE 'Active' END AS status,
        COUNT(*) AS n,
        MIN(last_seen_in_server) AS first_seen,
        MAX(last_seen_in_server) AS last_seen
    FROM conversations GROUP BY is_preserved_missing
""").df()
show_df(preservation)
```

```{python}
#| label: preserved-list
#| code-summary: "Lista das convs preserved_missing"

preserved = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        substr(conversation_id, 1, 8) AS conv_id,
        title,
        message_count AS msgs,
        strftime(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS created,
        strftime(last_seen_in_server, '%Y-%m-%d') AS last_seen,
        project IS NOT NULL AS in_project
    FROM conversations
    WHERE is_preserved_missing=TRUE
    ORDER BY last_seen_in_server
""").df()
show_df(preserved)
```

## 4.2 Custom GPT vs Project (`gizmo_id` distinction)

O servidor do ChatGPT mistura **Custom GPTs** e **Projects** no mesmo
campo `gizmo_id`, distinguidos pelo prefixo:

- `g-p-*` → Project (pasta com sources). Vai pra `project_id` no parquet.
- `g-*` (mas NAO `g-p-*`) → Custom GPT real. Vai pra `gizmo_id`.

```{python}
#| label: gizmo-distinction
#| code-summary: "Custom GPT vs Project — counts"

gizmo = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        SUM((project_id IS NOT NULL AND gizmo_id IS NULL)::INT) AS only_project,
        SUM((project_id IS NULL AND gizmo_id IS NOT NULL)::INT) AS only_custom_gpt,
        SUM((project_id IS NOT NULL AND gizmo_id IS NOT NULL)::INT) AS has_both,
        SUM((project_id IS NULL AND gizmo_id IS NULL)::INT) AS standalone
    FROM conversations
""").df()
show_df(gizmo)
```

::: {.callout-note}
## Anomalia observada

A coluna `has_both` em geral deveria ser zero (Custom GPT real e Project
sao mutuamente exclusivos), mas a 1 conv aparece com ambos. **Causa**:
quando a conv esta vinculada a um Custom GPT (`g-*`), o reconciler
tambem populou `_project_id` no raw com o mesmo valor. Sem impacto
pratico — apenas redundancia. O `gizmo_id` no parquet identifica
corretamente que eh Custom GPT real.
:::

```{python}
#| label: gizmo-list
#| code-summary: "Convs com Custom GPT real (sem agregar)"

custom_gpts = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        substr(conversation_id, 1, 8) AS conv_id,
        title,
        substr(gizmo_id, 1, 30) AS gizmo_id_preview,
        project_id IS NOT NULL AS also_in_project,
        message_count AS msgs
    FROM conversations WHERE gizmo_id IS NOT NULL
""").df()
show_df(custom_gpts)
```

## 4.3 Estados especiais (archived / temporary / pinned)

Campos canonicos `is_archived`, `is_temporary`, `is_pinned` capturam
estados especiais da conv no ChatGPT. **Pin nao existe na UI do ChatGPT
hoje** (verificado empiricamente em todo o schema raw — 0 campos pin/star/
favorite/bookmark a nivel de conv). Archive e Temporary chats existem.

```{python}
#| label: special-states
#| code-summary: "Counts de archived / temporary / pinned"

import pandas as pd
states = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_archived) AS archived,
        COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_temporary) AS temporary,
        COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE is_pinned) AS pinned,
        COUNT(*) AS total
    FROM conversations
""").df()
show_df(states)
```

Threads arquivadas (se houver):

```{python}
#| label: archived-detail
#| code-summary: "Threads com is_archived=true"

archived = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        substr(conversation_id, 1, 12) AS conv_id,
        substr(title, 1, 70) AS title,
        message_count AS msgs,
        substr(project_id, 1, 8) AS project,
        date_trunc('day', updated_at) AS last_update
    FROM conversations
    WHERE is_archived = true
    ORDER BY updated_at DESC
""").df()
print(f"Total arquivadas: {len(archived)}")
show_df(archived) if len(archived) else None
```

Threads temporarias (se houver — efemeras, nao persistem):

```{python}
#| label: temp-detail
#| code-summary: "Threads com is_temporary=true"

temp = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        substr(conversation_id, 1, 12) AS conv_id,
        substr(title, 1, 70) AS title,
        message_count AS msgs,
        date_trunc('day', updated_at) AS last_update
    FROM conversations
    WHERE is_temporary = true
    ORDER BY updated_at DESC
""").df()
print(f"Total temporarias: {len(temp)}")
show_df(temp) if len(temp) else None
```

## 4.4 Tabela completa filtravel

Todas as 1.171 conversas. Use a barra de busca pra filtrar por titulo,
project, ou qualquer campo. Click nos cabecalhos pra ordenar.

```{python}
#| label: full-table
#| code-summary: "Tabela filtravel (itables)"
#| column: page

from itables import show as itable_show

full = con.execute("""
    SELECT
        substr(conversation_id, 1, 8) AS conv_id,
        title,
        project,
        gizmo_id IS NOT NULL AS custom_gpt,
        message_count AS msgs,
        model,
        strftime(created_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS created,
        strftime(updated_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS updated,
        is_preserved_missing AS preserved
    FROM conversations
    ORDER BY created_at DESC
""").df()

itable_show(
    full,
    paging=True,
    searching=True,
    ordering=True,
    info=True,
    lengthMenu=[10, 25, 50, 100],
    classes="display compact",
)
```

```{python}
#| label: cleanup
#| code-summary: "Fechar conexao"
#| echo: false

con.close()
```
